data.title: PK Consumer Health acquires HealthAid Limited and HealthAid America Inc., a UK VMS player. (Characters: 84)
data.description: On March 4, 2026, PK Consumer Health ("PK"), a company backed by Avista Healthcare Partners and Damier Group, revealed its acquisition of HealthAid Limited and HealthAid America Inc. The deal involves the procurement of both entities, which are prominent providers in the healthcare industry.

data.title: GridPoint nearing $1.5B in customer energy savings with their energy management platform in 20,000+ commercial buildings.
data.description: Businesses are increasingly turning to cost-cutting measures as utility bills continue to increase. GridPoint, a top energy management company with its energy intelligence platform implemented in over 20,000 commercial buildings nationwide, is on the brink of reaching $1.5 million in savings for its clients.

data.title: Minerva Neurosciences (NERV) to attend The Citizens Life Sciences Conference in Miami on March 10-11, 2026.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Burlington, Massachusetts, Minerva Neurosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: NERV), a biopharmaceutical company in the clinical stage concentrating on therapies for central nervous system conditions, shared the news that Remy Luthringer, PhD, the Executive Chairman & CEO, would be involved in The Citizens Life Sciences Conference held in Miami, FL on March 10-11, 2026.

data.title: Glenmark Specialty SA gets FDA approval for Fluticasone Propionate Inhalation Aerosol, 44 mcg/actuation, with 180-day exclusivity.
data.description: In Elmwood Park, New Jersey, on March 4, 2026, Glenmark Specialty SA secured approval from the U.S. Food & Drug Administration for Fluticasone Propionate Inhalation Aerosol USP, containing 44 mcg per actuation. Glenmark's inhalation product, Fluticasone Propionate, received final clearance from the FDA.

data.title: Keeper Security launches Jira integrations for unified incident response and access governance, enforcing centralized control.
data.description: In a recent development, new integrations on Jira have been established to streamline security alerts, access requests, and approvals into a unified, controlled workflow. This enhancement allows for enforcement to remain centralized within Keeper Security. The initiative aims to boost efficiency and security measures within the system. The updates took effect in Chicago on March 4, 2026. Keeper Security is renowned for its zero-trust and zero-knowledge identity security, catering to privileged access management.

data.title: Wallbox N.V. reported €33.7 million revenue in Q4 2025 with 37.3% gross margin & €(7.3) million adjusted EBITDA.
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain, Wallbox N.V. (NYSE: WBX), a prominent global provider of electric vehicle charging and energy management solutions, revealed its financial outcomes for Q4 and the entirety of 2025. For the fourth quarter of 2025, the company reported revenue of €33.7 million, achieving a Gross Margin of 37.3%, marking a 546 basis point growth from the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA was reported at €(7.3) million for the quarter.

data.title: Pentair hosts Investor Day in New York City at 9:30am ET, with event expected to end by 12pm. Executives including CEO and CFO to make presentations.
data.description: Pentair plc (NYSE: PNR), a global water solutions company, is holding an Investor Day in New York City starting at 9:30 a.m. ET, scheduled to end around 12 p.m. ET. Key executives including President and CEO John Stauch and CFO Nick Brazis will deliver presentations. The event aims to provide insights into Pentair’s sustainability initiatives and future plans regarding water management.

data.title: Bath & Body Works reports Q4 net sales of $2.7 billion, down 2%, and earnings per share of $1.99. Full year 2025 earnings per diluted share $3.11. Offers 2026 guidance of net sales down 4.5% to 2.5%, earnings per share $3.00-$3.25. Free cash flow expected to be $600 million in 2026. Shares $400 million repurchased in fiscal 2025. Earnings call on March 4.
data.description: Bath & Body Works reported fourth quarter net sales of $2.7 billion, down 2%, with earnings per diluted share of $1.99 and adjusted earnings per diluted share of $2.05. For the full-year 2025, net sales were $7.3 billion, a decrease of 0.2%, and earnings per diluted share were $3.11. They provided guidance for 2026 with net sales expected to decline between 4.5% to 2.5%, and earnings per diluted share forecasted between $3.00 to $3.25. The company anticipates generating free cash flow of approximately $600 million in 2026. Share repurchases are not assumed in the outlook. Adjusted earnings per diluted share for 2026 are projected to be between $2.40 and $2.65, excluding specific items. The company's operating performance and guidance can be found on its Investor Relations website. Bath & Body Works is a global leader in personal care and home fragrance, emphasizing exceptional performance and luxury fragrance experiences.

data.title: Wall Street forecasts for Broadcom updated ahead of Q1 earnings; expectations of $1.88/share (up from $1.60/share) with revenue of $19.18 billion. AVGO stock fell 1.6% to $313.84.
data.description: Broadcom Inc is set to release its Q1 earnings on March 4, with expectations of $1.88 per share, up from $1.60 per share last year. Analysts anticipate quarterly revenue to hit $19.18 billion, a considerable rise from $14.92 billion in the previous year. The company has surpassed revenue estimates in the last four quarters and 18 out of the last 20 overall. As of Tuesday, Broadcom's shares closed at $313.84, reflecting a 1.6% drop. For further details on analyst ratings and insights, visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page. To learn more about how Benzinga's top analysts have rated Broadcom, check out the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ferguson Enterprises Inc.: Director Kelly Baker discloses initial transaction in company shares.
data.description: Kelly Baker, a Director, has notified of transactions involving common stock in a company, with a par value of $0.0001 per share. This initial notification is regarding the sale of shares by a person discharging managerial responsibilities. The transactions were disclosed in compliance with regulatory requirements.

data.title: Bitcoin's surge surpasses $71,000 as tensions rise in the Middle East. Will the rally endure?
data.description: As a result of positioning resets and changing liquidity expectations, Bitcoin has revisited the $71,000 mark amidst rising tensions in the Middle East.

data.title: Citi Trends (NASDAQ: CTRN) to present at UBS 2026 Global Consumer and Retail Conference on March 11 at 11:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: Citi Trends, Inc. (NASDAQ: CTRN), a prominent off-price value retailer focusing on apparel, accessories, and home trends for Black families in the US, revealed plans to participate in the UBS 2026 Global Consumer and Retail Conference on March 11, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET. The management team will represent the company during the event. A live webcast of the presentation will also be accessible to viewers.
